1.title: Access Rack Health Parameters for Selected Element

content.text: The system shall provide access via Rules & Action → [Element] → Rack Health Parameters and display a tabular list of sub-issue types for the selected element.
navigate to Rack Health Parameters from Rules & Action
I can view sub-issue types of the selected element.
the system opens the Rack Health Parameters page
displays a tabular list of sub-issue types for that specific element.

2.title: Display Columns in Rack Health Parameter Table

content.text: The table shall display columns:  Observation logged, Probability of Event, Effect of Event, Severity (badge), Severity Type (A/B/…), Risk Type (1–9).
the table to show required rack health parameter fields
I can understand the risk details clearly.
the Rack Health Parameters table is visible,

3.title: Open Rack Health Parameter Page From Action Menu

content.text: Clicking “Rack Health Parameter” in Rules & Action shall open the Rack Health Parameters list page. Of that particular selected element.
clicking “Rack Health Parameter” from Rules & Action to open the correct page
I see parameters only for that element.
I am on Rules & Action and click Rack Health Parameter,
the system opens the Rack Health Parameters list
The page shall display a search bar allowing users to search observations or issue types dynamically.
a search bar on the Rack Health Parameter page
I can dynamically filter observations/issue types.
the list filters dynamically based on:

5.title: Display Main Rack Health Parameter Table

content.text: The main “Rack health parameter” screen/table shall list all configured health parameter entries with columns: Observation ID, Observation Name, Probability of Event, Effect of Event, Severity.
the Rack Health Parameter screen to show configured entries
I can view all health parameters in one place.
the screen displays a table containing:
Each Observation shall be shown as a clickable hyperlink that opens the Rack Health Parameters Setup modal in edit mode.
each observation to be a hyperlink
I can open and edit specific parameters.
each Observation appears as a clickable hyperlink.
the Rack Health Parameter Setup modal opens in edit mode.
Severity column shall use visual tags (Amber/Red/Green).
the severity column to use coloured badges
the column uses coloured visual tags:
Pagination controls shall appear at the bottom right (e.g., Next, Previous, Page numbers).
pagination at the bottom of the table
I can navigate through multiple records.
more records than the page limit exist,
pagination controls appear at the bottom-right:
Rows per page” dropdown must allow users to select number of rows (10, 20, 50, 100).
a dropdown for selecting number of rows per page
I can expand or limit the visible list.
a “Rows per page” dropdown is shown with options:

10.title: Empty State for No Search Results

content.text: If no matching results found in search, show a friendly empty state: “No parameters found for the selected criteria.”
I understand that no matching data exists.
I type a search term that matches no results,
“No parameters found for the selected criteria.”
When user clicks an Observation from the observation column, the Rack Health Parameters Setup modal shall open.
clicking an observation to open its setup modal
the Rack Health Parameters Setup modal opens.

12.title: Modal Opens Centered With Close Icon

content.text: The modal shall open as a centered overlay with close icon (X) in top right.
the setup modal to appear centered
it is clearly visible and focused.
displays a close icon (X) in the top-right corner.
Navigation text “View Risk Chart” (hyperlink) shall appear on top right inside modal and shall open the Risk Assessment Chart modal.
a “View Risk Chart” hyperlink inside the modal
I can view the risk matrix/chart.
a hyperlink “View Risk Chart” appears in the top-right.
the Risk Assessment Chart modal opens.
The Rack Health Parameter modal shall include 4 sections:
Risk factors: Effect of event, Severity, Action
the modal organised into four sections
all attributes can be edited clearly.
the Rack Health Parameter modal opens,
The field Observation shall be displayed as a non-editable text box when editing an existing rule.
the Observation field to be locked during editing
I cannot modify the original observation text.
I open the Rack Health Parameter modal in edit mode,
the Observation field appears as a non-editable text box.
Risk Probability of Event shall include radio buttons: Minimal, Low, Moderate, High.
predefined radio options for Risk Probability
I can choose the correct probability level.
the Risk Probability of Event field displays radio buttons:
One probability option must always be selected. If nothing is selected at Save, show inline validation: “Please select probability of event.”
all assessments contain a probability value.
Effect of Event dropdown shall show impact categories (Minor, Significant, Critical, Catastrophic).
a dropdown for the Effect of Event
I can select the appropriate impact category.
the Effect of Event dropdown shows:
If Effect of Event is not selected, show inline error: “Select effect of event.”
an inline error when Effect of Event is not selected
I do not save incomplete assessments.
Severity field shall auto-populate based on the Severity Scale defined in the Risk Assessment Chart (Red/Amber/Green).
Severity to auto-fill based on the Risk Assessment Chart
Severity updates automatically using the matrix (Red/Amber/Green).
Severity Type field shall auto-populate based on matrix rule and be non-editable.
Severity Type to auto-populate and remain locked
it remains consistent with severity rules.
Severity Type updates automatically per matrix logic.
Action dropdown shall list configured actions (e.g., Replace, Repair, Monitor, etc.).
I can assign the correct corrective measure.
the Action dropdown lists configured actions:
Action field shall be mandatory. Empty selection shall show: “Please select an action.”
no rule is left without required action.
Severity and Severity Type fields shall become read-only and update automatically when user changes Probability or Effect of Event.
Severity and Severity Type to update automatically
values always reflect risk matrix logic.
Severity and Severity Type are read-only.
Probability or Effect of Event changes,
both Severity and Severity Type update automatically.
The Possible Reason text area shall allow multi-line input to capture defect analysis.
a text area for Possible Reason
I can enter detailed analysis notes.
Possible Reason appears as a multi-line text area.
The system shall support up to 500 characters in Possible Reason.
I can add enough detail without overfilling.
Possible Reason accepts up to 500 characters
If Required fields are missing, the modal shall not save and inline errors must appear below each field.
the system to stop me from saving incomplete data
any required field (Probability, Effect, Action) is empty,
inline errors appear under each missing field.
Edit Rack Health Parameters button at the bottom of the modal shall convert the form into editable mode (if initially view-only).
a button to switch from view-only to editable mode
the modal opens in view-only mode,
an Edit Rack Health Parameters button appears at the bottom.
Clicking Save Changes shall validate: Probability, Effect of Event, Action, and ensure Severity values are auto-generated.
the parameters are complete and correct.
If any validation fails, do not save.

After Clicking save changes a confirmation pop-up shall be displayed “Confirm changes?” – “Updating Rack Health Parameters will modify all observations that use this configuration. Are you sure you want to apply these changes?”.
a confirmation popup before applying changes
I understand the impact on multiple observations.
“Updating Rack Health Parameters will modify all observations that use this configuration. Are you sure you want to apply these changes?”
The confirmation pop-up shall display two buttons “Cancel” and “Apply Changes.”
I can confirm or cancel the update.
the popup closes and changes are discarded.

32.title: Cancel Discards Changes and Closes Modal

content.text: On clicking cancel the changes shall be discarded and the modal shall be closed.
On clicking “Apply changes” a green toast notification shall appear on Rack Health Parameter screen to the top right corner “Element Health Parameter updated successfully.”
a success toast after applying changes
I receive feedback on the update.
show toast at top-right on the Rack Health Parameter screen:
If the save operation succeeds, the Confirm modal shall close and the particular element’s Rack Health Parameters list shall refresh with updated values.
the list to refresh after saving changes
I see updated Rack Health Parameter values immediately.
the Rack Health Parameters list for that element refreshes
Severity and Severity Type must be auto-calculated based on the currently configured Risk Assessment Chart matrix.
Severity and Severity Type to be auto-calculated
they always follow the Risk Assessment Chart logic.
the Risk Assessment matrix is configured,
Changing Probability of Event or Effect of Event shall immediately refresh Severity and Risk Type.
Risk Type and Severity to refresh instantly
the calculated risk is always accurate.
I change Probability of Event or Effect of Event,
Invalid data entries (empty, malformed, or invalid state combinations) shall prevent save and show inline messaging.
validation for empty, malformed, or invalid values
only correct configurations can be saved.
any required field is missing or malformed,
inline error messages appear under invalid fields.
The system shall prevent conflicting configurations—same Observation + same risk mapping combination cannot be duplicated.
an Observation already exists with a defined probability/effect combination,
the user attempts to save a duplicate combination,
“A configuration with this Observation and risk mapping already exists.”
In the Rack Health Parameters Setup modal, clicking the “View Risk Chart” link (top-right) shall open a Risk Assessment Chart modal as a centered overlay, without closing the underlying Setup modal.
open the Risk Assessment Chart without losing progress
I can reference the matrix while editing.
the Risk Assessment Chart modal opens centered
Without closing or altering the underlying Setup modal.

40.title: Display Matrix Structure in Risk Chart Modal

content.text: The Risk Assessment Chart modal shall show a color-coded matrix with rows for Probability or Likelihood levels (High, Moderate, Low, Minimal) and columns for Minor, Significant, Critical, Catastrophic.
the modal to show a structured color-coded matrix
I can understand probability vs consequence levels.
the Risk Chart modal is open,

41.title: Show Risk Index Values & Colours in Matrix

content.text: Each matrix cell shall display the corresponding risk index value and background colours (Red / Amber / Green) representing the risk band. The values and colours are view-only in this modal.
each matrix cell to show risk value + colour band
I can interpret severity at a glance.
the Risk Chart modal is open,
A small legend or note shall appear below the matrix explaining how to interpret the numbers and colours (“The number are essentially a Risk Index – a relationship probability and consequence”
We recommend severity by number 1 to 9 as it allows what is in effect “shades” of each colour).
a legend explaining the numbers and colours
I understand how the matrix works.
a legend/note appears below the matrix:
“The numbers are essentially a Risk Index – a relationship between probability and consequence. Severity 1 to 9 allows finer differentiation within each color band.”
The Risk Assessment Chart modal shall have a Close (X) icon in the top-right. Clicking it shall close the chart and return focus to the Rack Health Parameters Setup modal.
close the Risk Assessment Chart modal
I can return to editing parameters.
the Risk Chart modal is open,
it displays a Close (X) button top-right.
user focus returns to the underlying Setup modal.

44.title: Disable Background Interaction When Risk Chart Is Open

content.text: While the Risk Chart is open, the background (Setup modal + list page) shall be dimmed and non-interactive.
I focus only on the Risk Chart modal.
the Risk Chart modal is open,
the Setup modal and list screen behind it become dimmed
